metadata.title: For Developers
metadata.description: List your Mexico development on Property Dreamz and reach thousands of pre-qualified international buyers. Get CMRE certified and access the developer portal.
metadata.ogDescription: Reach thousands of pre-qualified international buyers. Get CMRE certified and list your Mexico development.

hero.headline: We help you build visibility, trust, and qualified leads.
hero.description: Property Dreamz® is the all-in-one platform that helps developers showcase their projects, gain the trust of international buyers, and close more sales.

quickForm.heading: Grow Your Development With Property Dreamz®
quickForm.subheading: Join a platform built to connect great developments with the right buyers.
quickForm.successBody: Our team will reach out within 3 business days to discuss next steps.

steps.heading: Simple steps to grow your sales

items.title: Submit your project
items.body: Tell us about your development and upload key information.

items.title: Get verified
items.body: We review your documentation and certify your project.

items.title: We build your showcase
items.body: We create your premium listing with 360° tours and media.

items.title: We bring you leads
items.body: We promote your development and deliver qualified leads.

items.title: You close more sales
items.body: Connect with buyers and close with confidence.

platformTools.heading: All the tools. One powerful platform.

cards.title: 360° tours & media
cards.body: Immersive 360° tours, high-quality photos, videos and floor plans that bring your development to life.
cards.alt: Aerial view of a residential development

cards.title: Qualified leads
cards.body: We generate and deliver high-intent leads from international buyers actively looking to invest in Mexico.

cards.title: CMRE Certification
cards.body: Stand out with the CMRE certification badge and build instant trust with international buyers.

cards.title: Verifiable information
cards.body: Buyers have everything they need: documents, legal info, amenities, pricing and more — all verified and accessible.

cards.title: Marketing & exposure
cards.body: We promote your development across digital channels, putting it in front of thousands of potential buyers.

showcase.heading: Showcase your development like never before.
showcase.description: Give buyers a complete and transparent experience that helps them say "yes" with confidence.

certificationTrust.heading: The CMRE® Certification makes the difference.
certificationTrust.description: Our certification process verifies the legal, financial and operational status of your development, giving buyers the confidence they need to invest.
certificationTrust.sealAlt: CMRE — Certified Mexico Real Estate seal

points.title: Title & Deed Verification
points.body: Property ownership documentation review and validation.

points.title: Developer
points.body: Corporate, legal, and operational review of the developer.

points.title: Bank Trust (Fideicomiso)
points.body: Review of applicable trust structures and supporting documentation.

points.title: Media Production
points.body: Verification that marketing materials accurately represent the development.

closingCta.heading: Let's build something amazing together.
closingCta.scheduleCall: or schedule a call with our team
